to: html
  output-file: index.html
  standalone: true
  toc: true
  number-sections: false
  title-prefix: trysamplebook
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  
metadata
  crossref:
    chapters: true
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  bibliography:
    - references.bib
  editor: visual
  theme:
    - cosmo
    - brand
  title: trysamplebook
  author: Norah Jones
  date: 5/7/2026
